summary: Profile of Tom Seay and his TV show Best of America by Horseback, who uses and endorses Cavallo hoof boots and saddle pads on long-distance trail rides.
Short video-led page introducing Cavallo's range of hoof boot styles to help riders choose the right boot, including a clip on the boots' evolution and features.
Educational article on barefoot hoof care, explaining the benefits of going barefoot versus metal shoeing and how the hoof functions without shoes.
Profile of horse trainer Sandi Simons and her Creating Confidence program, explaining why she recommends Cavallo hoof boots to her students for shoeless hoof protection.
Webinar replay video featuring Dr. Tomas Teskey, DVM, on equine physiology, overall horse care, and the role of dentistry in hoof health.
Product page for the Cavallo BFB (Big Foot Boot) for draft and large-hoofed horses, sold as single boots in Regular sole sizes 7-10, made of 1680 Denier nylon.
Product page for Cavallo ProFlex Splint, Turnout and Brushing leg boots in black, sold in pairs, highlighting flexible, tear-resistant ProMesh TPU leg protection.
Product page for the Cavallo Canine genuine leather dog leash in Cocoa & Cinnamon, a premium-quality leash matching Cavallo's signature standards.
Product page for the Cavallo Canine genuine leather dog collar in Cocoa & Cinnamon, a premium soft-leather collar matching Cavallo's quality standards.
Product page for the Cavallo Canine genuine leather dog leash in Kelly Green, a premium-quality leash matching Cavallo's signature standards.
Product page for the Cavallo Canine genuine leather dog collar in Kelly Green, a premium soft-leather collar matching Cavallo's quality standards.
Product page for the Cavallo Canine genuine leather dog leash in Rose Pink, a premium-quality leash matching Cavallo's signature standards.
